info.title: Market Data Bridge Agent API
info.description: OpenAPI spec for the agent dispatcher endpoint with discriminator-based action routing.

post.description: Dispatch an action to the agent. Available actions (135): get_status, get_gpt_instructions, get_quote, get_historical_bars, get_stock_details, get_options_chain, get_option_quote, search_symbols, get_news, get_financials, get_status_request.description: Get system status, market session, and IBKR connection state

get_quote_request.description: Get real-time quote for a symbol

get_stock_details_request.description: Get stock details (sector, industry, description, market cap)

expiration.description: Option expiration date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., '20240315')

get_options_chain_request.description: Get options chain for a symbol

expiry.description: Option expiration date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., '20240315')

get_option_quote_request.description: Get quote for a specific option contract

search_symbols_request.description: Search for symbols by query string

get_news_request.description: Get news articles for a query

get_financials_request.description: Get financial data (revenue, margins, debt, analyst targets)

get_screener_filters_request.description: Get list of available screener IDs

run_screener_with_quotes_request.description: Run a stock screener with full quote data

startTime.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format or YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS

endTime.description: End time in ISO 8601 format or YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS

count.description: Maximum number of ticks to return (max 1000)

get_news_providers_request.description: Get list of IBKR news providers

get_news_article_request.description: Get specific news article from IBKR

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in YYYYMMDD HH:MM:SS format

endDateTime.description: End date/time in YYYYMMDD HH:MM:SS format

get_pnl_single_request.description: Get P&L for a single position

pattern.description: Search pattern (partial symbol or company name)

set_market_data_type_request.description: Set market data type (live, frozen, delayed)

get_histogram_data_request.description: Get histogram data for a symbol

expiry.description: Option expiration date in YYYYMMDD format

calculate_implied_volatility_request.description: Calculate implied volatility for an option

expiry.description: Option expiration date in YYYYMMDD format

get_tws_current_time_request.description: Get current time from TWS server

get_market_rule_request.description: Get market rule by rule ID

get_smart_components_request.description: Get smart routing components for an exchange

get_depth_exchanges_request.description: Get list of exchanges that support market depth

get_account_summary_request.description: Get account summary (buying power, cash, equity)

lmtPrice.description: Limit price (required for LMT, STP LMT, TRAIL LIMIT, REL orders)

auxPrice.description: Auxiliary price (stop price for STP/STP LMT, trailing amount for TRAIL)

entryPrice.description: Entry price (required for LMT, STP, STP LMT entry types)

place_bracket_order_request.description: Place a bracket order (entry + TP + SL)

outsideRth.description: Allow execution outside regular trading hours

ocaType.description: OCA type (1=Cancel with block, 2=Reduce with block, 3=Reduce non-block)

place_advanced_bracket_request.description: Place an advanced bracket order with full control

flatten_positions_request.description: Flatten all positions immediately with market orders

portfolio_exposure_request.description: Get portfolio exposure analysis (gross/net, sector breakdown, beta-weighted)

stress_test_request.description: Run portfolio stress test with market shock

size_position_request.description: Calculate position size based on risk parameters

get_risk_config_request.description: Get effective risk limits and configuration

tune_risk_params_request.description: Auto-tune risk parameters from recent outcomes

max_position_pct.description: Maximum position size as % of account

max_daily_loss_pct.description: Maximum daily loss as % of account

max_concentration_pct.description: Maximum concentration in single position as %

get_session_state_request.description: Get current session state (trades, P&L, lock status)

session_record_trade_request.description: Record a trade result in the session

actual_entry_price.description: Actual entry price if trade was taken

actual_exit_price.description: Actual exit price if trade was closed

simulate_weights_request.description: Simulate ensemble weights against historical evaluations

drift_report_request.description: Get model drift report (accuracy, calibration, regime shifts)

drift_check_request.description: Check model drift against thresholds and generate alerts

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

drift_alerts_request.description: Get recent model drift alerts from database

edge_report_request.description: Full edge analytics: rolling Sharpe/Sortino, win rate, profit factor, feature attribution, walk-forward validation

walk_forward_request.description: Walk-forward backtest: train/test split with weight optimization, proves out-of-sample edge vs luck

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return
Maximum number of items to return

check_inbox_request.description: Check inbox for recent events (fills, signals, drift alerts, order status). Poll this at conversation start.

id.description: Single item ID to mark as read

ids.description: Array of item IDs to mark as read

inbox_stats_request.description: Get inbox statistics (total, unread, breakdown by type)

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return

journal_get_request.description: Get a specific journal entry by ID

limit.description: Maximum number of trades to return
Maximum number of orders to return
Maximum number of executions to return
Maximum number of bars to return (max 300)

get_real_time_bars_request.description: Get buffered real-time bars from subscription

get_account_snapshot_stream_request.description: Get latest account snapshot from active subscription

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
Maximum number of symbols to return

holly_symbols_request.description: Get latest distinct symbols from Holly alerts

holly_predictor_status_request.description: Get Holly predictor status (profiles built, strategies, sample count)

min_samples.description: Minimum sample size for profile inclusion

holly_predictor_profiles_request.description: Get feature distribution profiles learned from historical Holly alerts

holly_predictor_scan_request.description: Scan a single symbol against Holly strategy profiles to detect pre-alert conditions

holly_predictor_scan_batch_request.description: Scan multiple symbols against Holly profiles in parallel

symbols.description: Array of stock ticker symbols to scan

limit.description: Maximum number of candidates to return

hours_back.description: Hours back to check for recent signals

holly_predictor_candidates_request.description: Get top pre-alert candidates â€” symbols most likely to trigger Holly alerts soon

min_samples.description: Minimum sample size for profile inclusion

holly_predictor_refresh_request.description: Rebuild Holly predictor profiles from latest data

holly_extract_rules_request.description: Reverse-engineer Holly trigger conditions: extract feature thresholds that distinguish Holly alerts from baseline evaluations

min_match_score.description: Minimum match score for rule firing

holly_backtest_request.description: Backtest extracted Holly rules across any symbol universe and timeframe. Reports precision, win rate, Sharpe, P&L per strategy

holly_strategy_breakdown_request.description: Quick breakdown of each Holly strategy: defining features, separation, outcome P&L

holly_trade_import_request.description: Import Holly trade CSV content (Trade Ideas export format)

file_path.description: Path to CSV file on disk

holly_trade_import_file_request.description: Import Holly trades from a file path on disk

holly_trade_stats_request.description: Get Holly trade statistics (total, win rate, avg R, avg giveback, avg hold time)

limit.description: Maximum number of trades to return

holly_trades_request.description: Query Holly historical trades with MFE/MAE/giveback metrics

holly_exit_autopsy_request.description: Full exit autopsy report: strategy leaderboard, MFE/MAE profiles, exit policy recommendations, time-of-day analysis, segment comparison

trailing_stop_optimize_request.description: Run all 19 trailing stop strategies on Holly trades, sorted by P&L improvement. Simulates fixed-%, ATR, time-decay, MFE-escalation, breakeven+trail exits

trailing_stop_summary_request.description: Compact comparison table of all trailing stop strategies: original vs simulated P&L, win rate, Sharpe, giveback reduction

trailing_stop_per_strategy_request.description: Find the optimal trailing stop for EACH Holly strategy independently. Shows best trailing params per strategy

trailing_stop_recommend_request.description: Get the best trailing stop recommendation for a symbol/strategy

trailing_stop_simulate_request.description: Simulate a single custom trailing stop strategy with specific parameters

trailing_stop_params_request.description: List all 19 default trailing stop parameter sets that can be tested

limit.description: Maximum number of signals to return

signal_feed_request.description: Query evaluated signals from auto-eval pipeline

auto_eval_status_request.description: Get auto-eval pipeline status (enabled, running, config)

auto_link_stats_request.description: Get evaluation-to-execution auto-link statistics and recent links

recalibration_status_request.description: Get Bayesian recalibration status: outcomes since last batch, per-regime weights, state file

features.description: Optional feature vector to override auto-computation

multi_model_score_request.description: Collect weighted scores from GPT, Gemini, and Claude providers

scores.description: Provider scores object with gpt4o, gemini, claude fields

multi_model_consensus_request.description: Return weighted consensus verdict and disagreement notes from provider scores

divoom_status_request.description: Check Divoom TimesFrame display connection and get device info

divoom_refresh_request.description: Force an immediate refresh of the TimesFrame market data dashboard

ops_health_request.description: Full ops health dashboard: process metrics, IBKR availability SLA, request latency percentiles, error rates, incidents

limit.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

ops_incidents_request.description: Get recent operational incidents (disconnects, errors, heartbeat timeouts)

ops_runbook_request.description: Get operational runbook guidance by scenario keyword

ops_uptime_request.description: Get uptime summary: process uptime, IBKR connection SLA, memory/CPU, error rate

ops_sla_request.description: Get availability SLA report: uptime % for bridge/IBKR/tunnel/end-to-end over 1h/24h/7d/30d windows

limit.description: Maximum number of outages to return

ops_outages_request.description: Get recent outages with duration and affected components
